title: Matrices — grids of numbers and how AI uses them
verdict: PASS (re-validation after targeted image-path fix). The embedded diagram reference is now `![Matrix structure diagram](./diagram.png)` at reading.md line 31 — correct relative to reading.md's location inside artifacts/, so it resolves to the sibling artifacts/diagram.png and matches sibling-topic convention (previously the broken `artifacts/diagram.png` resolved to artifacts/artifacts/diagram.png). Per harness instruction, the missing physical PNG (mmdc unavailable) is a known environment limitation and is NOT scored against the reading — only the path string was verified. Only that one path string changed; no prose changed, so length/citations/faithfulness/readability/scope are unchanged from the cycle-1 PASS and re-confirmed clean. All 7 standard checks pass.

revalidation_focus.trigger: module-drift found broken embedded-image path in reading.md (artifacts/diagram.png) resolving wrong from inside artifacts/
revalidation_focus.png_render_note: diagram.png physical render is out of scope for this reading verdict (mmdc unavailable, known env limitation); path-string correctness is the only image check applied.

format_discipline.notes: First line is H1 title, no YAML block. Sidecar parses with word_count, estimated_read_minutes, citations_used, sections. Exactly 6 sections in correct order: Overview, Key Concepts, Worked Example, In Practice, Key Takeaways, References. Diagram embedded in Key Concepts at line 31, now via ./diagram.png.

length.notes: Unchanged by the path fix. 713 words / ~3.1 min within budget. No prose changed in cycle 2.

citations.notes: [1] (machinelearningmastery.com, the only primary) cited multiple times. All 3 inline markers match bibliography entries 1:1. No orphans either direction. Unchanged from cycle 1.

no_forward_references.notes: Only backward refs (6.1, 6.2, 6.3 — all earlier in sequence and listed prerequisites). Advanced operations named-and-deferred as bare names with 'later topic' pointers; no mechanics taught, no IDs. Unchanged from cycle 1.

faithfulness.notes: Re-confirmed across 10 sampled assertions (matrix definition, row/column/cell, rows×columns, 1000×4 houses, 28×28 0-255 image, weight matrix, MNIST 70,000, recommendation matrix, 784×128 = 100,352 scalars, 5×3 student grid) — all trace to corpus. Prose unchanged.

beginner_readability.notes: School-register analogy precedes formal definition (concrete-first). Bold-term/plain-meaning definitions. No undefined cold terms, no hedging, short active sentences. Unchanged from cycle 1.

formatting.notes: Paragraphs 2-4 sentences. Bullet lists for definitions and takeaways, numbered steps in Worked Example, tables for size examples, inline examples at concept introduction. Unchanged from cycle 1.

assessment_references.notes: No assessment IDs, due weeks, or grade weights in learner prose.

scope.notes: Holds the headline: matrix structure, rows×columns notation, row-as-feature-vector, images as pixel grids, one-sentence weight-matrix mention. Advanced ops named only. No premature depth. Unchanged from cycle 1.

hard_fail_escalation.reason: No scope_creep; checks 5-6 produced 0 distinct findings (threshold 3).

gold_example_comparison.notes: No gold example at .claude/references/gold-examples/reading/ — evaluated against written standards in artifact-mix.json and the reading-critic skill.
